name: 두산에너빌리티
ai_analysis: 두산에너빌리티(034020.KS)는 현재 106,300 KRW에 거래되고 있으며, 애널리스트 컨센서스는 18명의 참여자 기준 '적극 매수' 의견입니다. 평균 목표가는 118,833 KRW로, 현재 주가 대비 11.8% 상승 여력이 있는 것으로 분석됩니다.

news.title: Doosan selects ANDRITZ as supplier for pumped storage power plant in South Korea
news.summary: Doosan Enerbility has selected ANDRITZ to supply the pump turbine units for the new Yeongdong pumped storage plant in Chungcheong Province, South Korea.

news.title: South Korea Stocks Cap Strongest Rally in 25 Years as Kospi Surges 76%
news.summary: The Kospi outperformed global peers in 2025, led by chips, defense, nuclear power and K-beauty stocks.
